interpretation: Fair - consider waiting or take precautions
advice: Based on the weather data, I advise you to wait a bit longer to harvest your wheat. The high humidity and rainfall are not ideal, and harvesting now may lead to fungal diseases that can damage your crop. This week, watch out for too much rain and high humidity, as these conditions can worsen the situation. Once the weather improves, harvest your wheat and dry it properly to a moisture level of 12% or less, then store it in a well-ventilated, dry area to keep it safe and fresh.
